description: P0 Work-In-Progress cap policy. Limits the number of concurrent high-priority issues in active work to maintain queue discipline.

candidateSort.description: Newest issues are first candidates for demotion
Blocked issues are prioritized for demotion
Issues without open PRs are preferred for demotion

override.label: wip-cap:override
override.description: Apply wip-cap:override label to temporarily exempt an issue. Override expires after maxDurationHours and will be flagged in subsequent reconcile runs.
